aboutAssistant.title: About this Career Assistant
aboutAssistant.description: This page features an AI-powered Career Assistant that deeply understands {{name}}'s professional background. You can ask detailed questions about their experience, technical skills, projects, and career achievements — and get thoughtful, contextual answers.
